sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Eaton expands Nebraska for AI data center gear
feed.summary: Eaton is investing over $30 million to open a new 370,000-square-foot manufacturing facility near Omaha, Nebraska, to meet the surging demand for medium-voltage switchgear driven by the AI data center boom. The expansion is expected to create more than 200 engineering, manufacturing, and production jobs and will support the production of critical electrical infrastructure for data centers, utilities, and industrial power systems. Production at the new facility is slated to begin in the first half of 2027, with hiring starting later this year.

feed.title: Cincinnati Financial sets April 28 webcast after Q1 results
feed.summary: Cincinnati Financial (Nasdaq: CINF) plans to release its first-quarter 2026 results on Monday, April 27, 2026, after market close. The company will then hold a conference call and webcast to discuss these results on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, at 11 a.m. ET. Investors can access the live webcast and later a replay via the company's investor website.

feed.title: Cantor Fitzgerald raises Bristol-Myers Squibb stock price target to $54
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald has increased its price target for Bristol-Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) shares to $54 from $45, while maintaining a Neutral rating. The firm cited a higher near-term outlook for Eliquis as the reason, noting the stock has been a strong performer in large-cap biopharma, delivering a 32% return over the past six months and boasting a 56-year dividend payment streak. Investor focus continues to be on potential second-half catalysts, even as the stock currently trades above the new target.

feed.title: Ohio pharmacists get paid to catch missed diabetes and blood pressure checks
feed.summary: Humana Healthy Horizons in Ohio and CPESN® USA have launched a Pharmacist Quality Rewards program to improve chronic condition care in Ohio. This value-based initiative incentivizes community pharmacists to close care gaps for Humana members with hypertension and diabetes by identifying those missing recommended screenings or having out-of-range results, often offering point-of-care testing, and notifying prescribers when follow-up is needed. The program aims to leverage the frequent interactions between patients and pharmacists to enhance health outcomes and access to care.

feed.title: General Electric Co reaches 5-day high amid strong market performance
feed.summary: General Electric Co's stock rose 7.40% in pre-market trading, reaching a 5-day high, driven by strong market performance with the Nasdaq-100 and S&P 500 also seeing significant gains. This positive investor sentiment is attributed to broader market trends despite some concerns regarding GE Aerospace's year-to-date performance. Wall Street analysts project a continued rise in GE's stock price, with an average target of $345.67, and recent analyst actions include a price target downgrade by Citi and an Overweight initiation by Wells Fargo for GE Aerospace.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Stanley Black & Decker to $75 From $82, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has revised its price target for Stanley Black & Decker (SWK) shares to $75, a decrease from the previous $82, while keeping an "Equalweight" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes shortly after the company completed the acquisition of Consolidated Aerospace Manufacturing, LLC and the sale of its aerospace unit. The article also lists recent news and other analyst adjustments for Stanley Black & Decker.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Stryker Price Target to $357 From $403, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has adjusted its price target for Stryker (SYK) to $357 from $403, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This update reflects a change in the firm's outlook for the medical equipment company. The article also notes recent price target adjustments from other analysts, including Citigroup and Evercore ISI.

feed.title: Policy Updates: John Deere agrees to $99M settlement in antitrust class-action lawsuit
feed.summary: John Deere has agreed to a $99 million settlement in an antitrust class-action lawsuit filed by U.S. farmers who alleged the company restricted access to equipment repairs, leading to increased service costs. The settlement, which requires court approval, will compensate farmers who paid for repairs through Deere dealers since 2018. Additionally, Deere committed to providing digital repair tools to farmers for the next 10 years, promoting greater independence in equipment maintenance.

feed.title: Vanderbilt University Acquires New Stake in Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. $MAA
feed.summary: Vanderbilt University has acquired a new stake in Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc. (MAA), purchasing 12,149 shares valued at approximately $1.69 million in Q4. This move comes as MAA reported a significant EPS miss and provided conservative guidance for Q1 and FY2026, alongside declaring a quarterly dividend of $1.53, representing a 4.9% yield with an elevated payout ratio. The article also details other institutional investor activity, stock performance metrics, insider sales, and recent analyst ratings, which reflect a mixed-to-cautious outlook on MAA.

feed.title: Vanderbilt University Sells 6,312 Shares of American Tower Corporation $AMT
feed.summary: Vanderbilt University decreased its stake in American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) by 13.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 6,312 shares and retaining 41,555 shares valued at about $7.30 million. Despite mixed financial results including a dividend increase but missed EPS estimates, institutional ownership remains high at 92.69%, and analysts have a "Moderate Buy" consensus with a target price of $216.76. Insider transactions show both buying and significant selling activity.

feed.title: Vanderbilt University Acquires 12,241 Shares of Crown Castle Inc. $CCI
feed.summary: Vanderbilt University significantly increased its stake in Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE:CCI) by 167.2% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 12,241 shares and bringing its total holdings to 19,563 shares valued at approximately $1.74 million. Other major institutional investors also adjusted their positions in the real estate investment trust. Analyst sentiment for Crown Castle is mixed but leans positive with a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average target price of $98.28, despite some recent price target reductions.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley says EU auto suppliers outperform after energy crises
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley's analysis suggests that European automotive suppliers tend to perform better than the broader sector following energy crises, with tire manufacturers also showing strong rebounds despite being considered safe havens during downturns. The European auto sector recently saw a significant rise after a US-Iran ceasefire agreement, which is expected to improve macroeconomic conditions and reduce inflation risks. While suppliers usually underperform during crises, they often become major beneficiaries once the crisis resolves, and investors are advised to proceed with caution as initial market reactions might underestimate the long-term impact.

feed.title: Henry Schein (HSIC) Announces Board of Directors Restructuring
feed.summary: Henry Schein (HSIC) plans to reduce its Board of Directors from fifteen to ten members after the 2026 Annual Meeting. Stanley Bergman, after 44 years, will retire and be named Chairman Emeritus, while several other board members will not seek re-election. The article also provides an overview of the company's market position, financial health, valuation, and risk assessment.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on GE Healthcare Technologies to $81 From $97, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has updated its price target for GE Healthcare Technologies (GEHC) to $81, down from $97, while reiterating a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst actions, including Citigroup and Evercore ISI also revising their price targets for the medical technology company. The article also provides a company profile, recent news, and analyst consensus data for GE HealthCare Technologies.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Abbott Laboratories to $121 From $140, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has lowered its price target for Abbott Laboratories (ABT) to $121 from $140, while reaffirming a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions, including Evercore ISI and BTIG Research, who also recently adjusted their price targets for Abbott.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Insulet to $277 From $326, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has adjusted its price target for Insulet Corporation (PODD) to $277, down from $326, while concurrently maintaining a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other recent analyst actions, including Citigroup downgrading Insulet to Neutral with a price target of $230, and Evercore ISI adjusting its price target to $240 while maintaining an Outperform rating. Insulet specializes in medical devices for insulin-dependent diabetes, with notable products like the Omnipod system.

feed.title: Shareholders (PEP) urge vote FOR Proposal 5 at May 6, 2026 AGM
feed.summary: Shareholders are being urged to vote FOR Proposal 5 at PepsiCo's (PEP) annual general meeting on May 6, 2026. This proposal requests increased disclosure on the effectiveness of PepsiCo's human rights due diligence systems across its operations, franchisees, and value chain, citing gaps in current reporting that hinder investors' ability to evaluate practical performance, especially in higher-risk areas. The initiative is supported by various faith-based and institutional investors, emphasizing the importance of transparency for assessing long-term value creation and risk management.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Clorox to $110 From $125, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for Clorox (NYSE: CLX) to $110 from $125, while maintaining an Equalweight rating on the stock. This adjustment comes after other firms like UBS and TD Cowen also revised their price targets on the consumer products company. The article also notes Clorox's recent acquisition of GOJO Industries, including the Purell brand.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Price Target on Intuitive Surgical to $609 From $714, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has adjusted its price target for Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) to $609, down from $714, while reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. This update reflects a re-evaluation by the firm's analysts. The news was published on April 8, 2026, at 08:16 am EDT.

feed.title: FedEx Freight Unit Projects 10% Profit Growth After Spinoff
feed.summary: FedEx Freight is projected to achieve average profit growth of 10% to 12% over the next few years following its spinoff from the parent company. The unit also anticipates average revenue growth of up to 6% and expects to generate over $1 billion in free cash flow in its medium-term outlook. This outlook comes as part of its separation from FedEx Corp.'s core parcel-shipping business.

feed.title: FedEx Freight Hosts Inaugural Investor Day Ahead of Planned Spinoff from FedEx
feed.summary: FedEx Freight is hosting its first Investor Day in New York City to present its strategy for profitable growth as an independent company, ahead of its planned spinoff from FedEx Corporation on June 1, 2026. The leadership team outlined strategic priorities including network optimization, a differentiated commercial offering, advanced technology, and financial value creation. The company also introduced a medium-term financial outlook, projecting 4-6% CAGR in revenue growth and 10-12% CAGR in adjusted operating income growth.

feed.title: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Coinbase Global, Diamondback Energy, Deere, Doximity, Dutch Bros., Johnson & Johnson, Robinhood Markets, Verizon and More
feed.summary: This article provides a summary of top Wall Street analyst upgrades, downgrades, and initiations announced on Wednesday, April 8, 2026, for various companies including Coinbase Global, Diamondback Energy, and Johnson & Johnson. The market context highlights stock increases due to a ceasefire agreement, with investors turning attention to first-quarter earnings and forward guidance. The report also covers performance across major indices, treasury bonds, oil and gas, precious metals, and cryptocurrencies.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts Price Target on Quest Diagnostics to $210 From $220, Maintains In Line Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has adjusted its price target for Quest Diagnostics (DGX) to $210, down from $220, while maintaining an "In Line" rating on the stock. This update reflects a revised outlook from the analyst firm. The article also provides a brief company profile for Quest Diagnostics, outlining its primary business activities in diagnostics testing and information services.

feed.title: Franco-Nevada Corp - government of Panama approves processing of stockpiled ore at Cobre Panamá
feed.summary: The government of Panama has approved the processing of stockpiled ore at the Cobre Panamá mine, impacting Franco-Nevada Corp. This development follows previous reports concerning First Quantum and Franco-Nevada receiving similar approvals for the Cobre Panamá operation. The article also provides recent news and financial data related to Franco-Nevada Corporation, a gold-focused royalty and streaming company involved in various precious metals projects globally.

feed.title: Here’s Why Monolithic Power Systems Stock Is Set for New Highs in 2026
feed.summary: Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) reported strong Q4 2025 earnings with revenue beating consensus and raised its Q1 2026 guidance, driven by accelerating growth in non-Enterprise Data segments and a planned shift to higher-ASP products. While Wall Street analysts have a mean target of $1,328.29, TIKR's valuation model suggests a mid-case price target of $2,325.61, indicating significant undervaluation against its projected EPS growth. Key catalysts include validating Enterprise Data booking surge and resolving an accounting overhang from restated financials.

feed.title: 6 Materials Stocks Moving In Wednesday's Pre-Market Session
feed.summary: This article reports on six materials stocks experiencing significant movement during Wednesday's pre-market session. Gold Fields and Critical Metals saw gains, while Gulf Resources, Sasol, CF Industries Holdings, and LSB Industries experienced declines. The article provides the percentage change and market capitalization for each listed company.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark Statement on Ontario, California Fire at Distribution Center Operated by NFI Industries
feed.summary: A fire occurred at a distribution center in Ontario, California, operated by NFI Industries, a third-party logistics partner for Kimberly-Clark. No injuries were reported, and all employees were safely evacuated. Kimberly-Clark, whose manufacturing assets were not affected, has activated a response team and insurance policies to manage the situation and minimize impact on customers and consumers, with further updates expected on April 28th.

feed.title: Yum! Brands’ Byte Platform Rewrites Playbook for Restaurant Technology
feed.summary: Yum! Brands has introduced Byte by Yum!, an AI-driven platform designed to simplify and unify restaurant digital tools, including ordering, POS, kitchen operations, inventory, and labor management. Launched in 2025, the platform is already live in approximately 38,000 restaurants globally, supporting $40 billion in systemwide digital sales and leading to significant improvements in customer satisfaction and operational efficiency. Byte's scalability and personalization capabilities are enabling brands like Pizza Hut and Taco Bell to innovate and grow, with future expansion planned for KFC in major markets.

feed.title: BOTOX® Cosmetic (onabotulinumtoxinA) Empowers Women Entrepreneurs Through "The Confidence Collective" for Fourth Year
feed.summary: Allergan Aesthetics, an AbbVie company, announced applications are open for "The Confidence Collective: Empowering Women Entrepreneurs" for the fourth year, an initiative by BOTOX® Cosmetic dedicated to supporting women in business. The program will offer resources, coaching, community, and grant funding, with 20 women receiving $20,000 each. Since 2023, the brand has awarded $1.2 million to grant winners to help overcome systemic barriers faced by women entrepreneurs.

feed.title: Hologic (HOLX) Stock; Trades Flat as CEO Exit and $18.3B Blackstone-TPG Buyout Nears Final Close
feed.summary: Hologic's shares traded mostly flat as its $18.3 billion acquisition by Blackstone and TPG nears completion, with all regulatory approvals cleared. CEO Steve MacMillan is set to step down following the finalization of the deal, expected around April 7, 2026. Shareholders will receive $76 per share in cash, plus a contingent value right for potential additional payments.

feed.title: ClearBridge energy fund's top 10 holdings made up 73% of investments
feed.summary: ClearBridge Energy Midstream Opportunity Fund Inc. (EMO) announced its unaudited balance sheet information as of March 31, 2026, reporting net assets of $1.15 billion and a net asset value per share of $57.28. The fund's top ten equity holdings accounted for 73.1% of its total investments, with Targa Resources Corp. and Energy Transfer LP being the largest. The report also detailed the fund's asset coverage ratios and liabilities, providing transparency on its financial structure.

feed.title: J.P. Morgan Maintains Intercontinental Exchange(ICE.US) With Buy Rating, Maintains Target Price $182
feed.summary: J.P. Morgan has reiterated its Buy rating for Intercontinental Exchange (ICE.US) and maintained its target price at $182. This indicates a continued positive outlook from the firm regarding the company's stock performance.

feed.title: Crop Protection Chemicals Market 2026- 2033 Overview: Share,
feed.summary: The Crop Protection Chemicals Market is projected to grow from USD 80.86 billion in 2026 to USD 129.00 billion in 2033, exhibiting a compound annual growth rate of 6.9%. This growth is attributed to rising industry demand, expanding applications, and technological advancements. The report provides a comprehensive analysis of market size, revenue trends, key growth factors, competitive landscape, and regional assessments, offering actionable insights for businesses.

feed.title: EXL will post first-quarter 2026 results after the close April 28
feed.summary: ExlService Holdings (NASDAQ: EXLS) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. The company will host a conference call with CEO Rohit Kapoor and CFO Maurizio Nicolelli the following day, April 29, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. EDT to discuss the results. A webcast replay will be available for approximately one year.

feed.title: AT&T and Fanatics Announce Strategic Five-Year Partnership, with AT&T Named the “Official Connectivity Provider of the Fan”
feed.summary: AT&T and Fanatics have formed a five-year strategic partnership, naming AT&T the "Official Connectivity Provider of the Fan." This collaboration aims to enhance the sports fan experience by leveraging AT&T's network and Fanatics' extensive reach, offering AT&T customers exclusive benefits such as enhanced loyalty experiences, FanCash opportunities, and access to events like Fanatics Fest NYC. The partnership focuses on deepening fan engagement, redefining connectivity, and exploring future opportunities in retail and co-branded offerings.

feed.title: BMO Wealth Management Names Ali Nafii to Lead San Diego Market
feed.summary: BMO Wealth Management has appointed Ali Nafii as Managing Director for the San Diego market. Nafii, a veteran from Northern Trust Wealth Management, will focus on expanding BMO's wealth management presence in the West Region, particularly serving high-net-worth clients in San Diego. This strategic hire reinforces BMO's commitment to growing its California footprint and integrating wealth management services with its existing strong commercial banking relationships in the area.

feed.title: Marketing teams now treat AI like a baseline tool, new study finds
feed.summary: A new study by Callan Consulting, joined by NetApp, reveals that AI has transitioned from an experimental concept to a foundational tool in modern marketing. The report, "State of AI in Technology Marketing 2026," indicates that AI is deeply integrated into marketing workflows for content, optimization, and analytics, with data quality and governance emerging as key priorities. While AI offers benefits in speed and cost avoidance, challenges remain in measuring direct ROI, emphasizing the continued need for human judgment and oversight.

feed.title: The 7 Best Costco Deals To Shop in April
feed.summary: Costco's April deals feature a variety of fruit-forward snacks and refreshing beverages perfect for spring. Shoppers can find discounts on items like Welch's Fruit 'n Yogurt Snacks, GoGo SqueeZ Organic Applesauce, Unreal Dark Chocolate Coconut Minis, and Bai Antioxidant Beverages. The article also highlights deals on Pure Organic Layered Fruit Bars, Nature Valley Crunchy Granola Bars, and La Colombe Strawberry Mocha Draft Lattes, all designed to satisfy spring cravings and support busy lifestyles.

feed.title: Netflix (NFLX) Kicks Off ‘Playground’ App for Ad-Free Kids Gaming
feed.summary: Netflix has launched "Netflix Playground," a new standalone mobile app targeting children aged eight and under, featuring ad-free games like Peppa Pig and Sesame Street. This initiative aims to expand its family entertainment offerings and boost subscription retention, especially after recent price hikes. The app, available in select regions and rolling out globally by April 28, 2026, supports offline play and is bundled with existing Netflix subscriptions at no additional cost.

feed.title: MetLife Foundation Awards Over $6.5 Million Globally to Address Essential Community Needs
feed.summary: MetLife Foundation has announced new recipients of its Community Impact Grant Program (CIGP), distributing over $6.5 million to more than 100 nonprofit organizations worldwide. These grants address essential community needs, focusing on food security, mental well-being, environmental sustainability, and vibrant communities. Since its launch, the CIGP has awarded over $9 million to 207 nonprofits, reaching 1.6 million people across multiple continents, with MetLife employees assisting in the selection process.

feed.title: Lennox will post first-quarter results before the market opens April 29
feed.summary: Lennox (NYSE: LII) is scheduled to report its first-quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on April 29, 2026, with an accompanying earnings conference call and webcast at 8:30 a.m. Central Time. CEO Alok Maskara and CFO Michael Quenzer will discuss the results and outlook, followed by a Q&A session. Key figures such as dial-in numbers and conference ID for investors are provided, alongside information on replay availability.

feed.title: FDA clears at-home HPV kit as 60% of cervical cancer cases hit unscreened people
feed.summary: Waters Corporation announced FDA clearance of its Onclarity HPV Self-Collection Kit and approval of the BD Onclarity HPV Assay for at-home use. This development aims to significantly increase access to cervical cancer screening, particularly for the 60% of cases occurring in unscreened or under-screened individuals. The kit, which features comprehensive HPV genotyping, will be available by prescription in the coming months and is expected to be covered by private insurance, Medicaid, and Medicare.

feed.title: Forbes names Fifth Third a best bank for 2026 for the fourth year
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (Nasdaq: FITB) has been recognized by Forbes as one of the World’s Best Banks for the fourth consecutive year in 2026. This ranking is based on a survey of over 54,000 consumers who evaluated banks on criteria such as trust, customer service, digital services, and financial advice. Fifth Third’s consistent inclusion on the list highlights its commitment to customer satisfaction through innovative products like Fifth Third Momentum® Banking and its highly-rated mobile banking app.

feed.title: RBC Raises Price Target on Diamondback Energy to $240 From $173, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets has increased its price target on Diamondback Energy (FANG) to $240 from $173, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook on the oil and gas exploration and production company. The article notes that the full content is reserved for members.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) Rating Increased to Hold at Evercore
feed.summary: Evercore has upgraded Keurig Dr Pepper (NASDAQ:KDP) to a "hold" rating. This decision aligns with the company's current consensus rating, with other analysts also providing varying ratings and price targets for the beverage giant. KDP recently reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue.

feed.title: Oak Thistle LLC Buys Shares of 16,189 Jacobs Solutions Inc. $J
feed.summary: Oak Thistle LLC recently acquired a new stake of 16,189 shares in Jacobs Solutions Inc. (NYSE:J) during the fourth quarter, valued at approximately $2.14 million. The company has a "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $156.60, and recently increased its quarterly dividend to $0.36 per share. Other hedge funds also adjusted their holdings in Jacobs Solutions, and company insider Shannon Miller sold 1,440 shares.

feed.title: Oak Thistle LLC Boosts Holdings in KeyCorp $KEY
feed.summary: Oak Thistle LLC significantly increased its stake in KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) by 57.1% during the fourth quarter, now owning 167,794 shares valued at $3.46 million. This makes KeyCorp its 17th largest holding, representing 0.5% of its portfolio. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their positions in KeyCorp, and analysts have issued new price targets, with an average rating of "Moderate Buy" and a target price of $22.61.

feed.title: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL Sells 13,827 Shares of Allegion PLC $ALLE
feed.summary: Tudor Investment Corp ET AL reduced its stake in Allegion PLC by 24.4% in Q3, selling 13,827 shares, now holding 42,756 shares valued at $7.58 million. This comes as analysts have cut price targets for Allegion, resulting in a consensus "Hold" rating, despite the company increasing its quarterly dividend. Allegion missed Q3 EPS estimates but saw its revenue increase by 9.3% year-over-year.

feed.title: 50,854 Shares in WEC Energy Group, Inc. $WEC Acquired by Oak Thistle LLC
feed.summary: Oak Thistle LLC has acquired a new position of 50,854 shares in WEC Energy Group, Inc. (NYSE:WEC), valued at approximately $5,363,000, making it their third-largest holding. Other institutional investors also adjusted their stakes in WEC Energy Group, indicating significant institutional interest in the utility provider. Insiders, including VP Mary Beth Straka and Director Ulice Payne, Jr., have recently sold shares, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $120.73.

feed.title: Oak Thistle LLC Has $2.99 Million Stake in VICI Properties Inc. $VICI
feed.summary: Oak Thistle LLC significantly increased its stake in VICI Properties Inc. by 243.5% in the fourth quarter, now holding 106,228 shares valued at $2.99 million. Other major institutional investors also increased their holdings. VICI Properties recently reported its quarterly earnings, missing analyst estimates slightly on EPS but meeting revenue expectations, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.45 per share.
